rulings.Case Title: HARLAN KETCHUM VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BHC)
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON JUNE 7, 2006 DEFENDANT CURTISS-WRIGHT CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. JUNE 1, 2006 ENTRY OF REGISTER OF ACTIONS INDICATES THAT THE PLAINTIFF PASSED AWAY. COURT PRESENTLY LACKS JURISDICTION TO ADJUDICATE CLAIMS. SEE PHAM V. WAGNER, LITHO MACHINERY CO. (1985) 172 CAL.APP 3RD 966, 973.)
